title: thelypteris arenicola
intro: Thelypteris arenicola, also known as the sandy fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris arenicola are said to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris arenicola can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
